blogs.title: Oblivious
blogs.body: A thrilling story about a detective who loses his memory but must solve a case that's deeply personal. As he uncovers clues, he realizes he may be investigating himself.
blogs.author: Joseph

blogs.title: The Tudors
blogs.body: An epic historical drama following the tumultuous reign of Henry VIII and his six wives. Politics, romance, and betrayal intertwine in this royal saga.
blogs.author: Shang Chi

blogs.title: Mr Queen
blogs.body: A modern-day chef finds his consciousness trapped in the body of a queen from Korea's Joseon period. Hilarity ensues as he navigates royal court life while trying to return to his time.
blogs.author: Temi

blogs.title: The Last Kingdom
blogs.body: Set in 9th century England, this series follows a Saxon boy raised by Vikings who must choose between his birth country and the people who raised him.
blogs.author: Joseph

blogs.title: Vincenzo
blogs.body: An Italian mafia lawyer returns to his homeland of Korea, where he uses his skills to fight against corrupt corporations alongside a quirky law firm.
blogs.author: Shang Chi

blogs.title: Breaking Bad
blogs.body: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with cancer turns to manufacturing drugs to secure his family's financial future, leading him down a dangerous path of crime.
blogs.author: Joseph

blogs.title: Stranger Things
blogs.body: In a small town in the 1980s, a group of kids encounter supernatural forces and secret government exploits as they search for their missing friend.
blogs.author: Temi

blogs.title: The Crown
blogs.body: A historical drama chronicling the life of Queen Elizabeth II and the events that shaped the second half of the twentieth century in the British monarchy.
blogs.author: Shang Chi
